title: Event Outbox + One-way Sync Contract v0

flow.consumer: future downstream feed service after checkpoint approval

field_rules.event_id: opaque UUID generated by the future outbox producer
field_rules.occurred_at: UTC timestamp for when the reviewed public event occurred
field_rules.public_record_ref: public slug or public profile URL only

idempotency_policy.consumer_requirement: Consumers must treat duplicate idempotency_key values as already processed.
idempotency_policy.producer_requirement: Future producers must not generate a new idempotency key for the same logical public-record change.

retry_policy.poison_event_handling: move to reviewed error queue without deleting last successful public snapshot
retry_policy.failure_rule: failed sync must not zero out public scores or remove last known reviewed public data

drift_handling.consumer_reconciliation: consumer must reconcile by public_record_ref and schema_version
drift_handling.stale_marker: future consumer may mark records stale but must not invent replacement facts

validation_rules: Every event_type must be declared in allowed_event_types.
Every payload field must be declared in allowed_payload_fields.
Denied payload fields must never appear in event payloads.
Events must reference public records only.
Events must not contain raw database rows.
No Supabase trigger, webhook runtime, Laravel runtime, Redis production config, or server config is created by PR83.
No full-table sync or I/O-heavy polling is allowed.
